name: Bright Starts Oball Easy Grasp Classic Ball BPA-Free Infant Toy in Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Age Newborn and up, 4 Inches
bullets: Bright Starts Oball is a fan-favorite toy ball that has been engaging tiny fingers for over 25 years; flexible design features large finger holes to help baby easily grip and explore
Get baby moving with this crawl-worthy toy; little ones can’t resist chasing after the classic Oball toy, practicing their gross motor skills while they play
Encourages baby’s fine motor skills with easy-grasp design made for little hands; helps build confidence to grip, roll, and throw with ease
Easy to take on the go with compact 4" diameter; fits in most diaper bags and makes a great addition to your collection of stroller toys
Makes a great first toy for baby; great for gifting occasions from baby showers to birthdays to holidays; must-have newborn toys for ages 0 months and up; wipes clean
description: Get a grip on playtime with the Oball Classic Easy-Grasp Toy from Bright Starts - the baby ball loved by families for over 25 years! With its flexible, easy-to-hold design, baby’s first ball helps little hands practice two-handed play and strengthen fine motor skills. The 4" diameter is perfectly sized for babies of all ages to grip, roll, and toss. As baby chases after their Oball, they’ll build crawling confidence and gross motor skills, too! The soft, safe construction with large finger holes makes it simple for tiny hands to grasp, while bright pink and purple colors provide engaging visua

reviews.name: Joshua
reviews.title: The most perfect little baby toy
reviews.body: This is a fantastic toy for my four month old son. He loves the different colors and there are so many places for him to grip and grab. It is very lightweight and doesn’t hurt him if he drops it on his face! It is really easy to clean and easy to pack in his diaper bag. Such a great toy for such a great price!

reviews.name: DC
reviews.title: Baby loves it!
reviews.body: This has quickly become the go-to toy in our house. The design is brilliant because the holes make it so easy for tiny fingers to loop through and get a firm grip, even before they’ve fully mastered their motor skills. My little one loves the rattling sound it makes when they shake it, and it’s lightweight enough that I don't have to worry if they accidentally bonk themselves in the face with it while playing.

reviews.name: Ky
reviews.title: Our favorite toy!
reviews.body: My 5 month old loves this ball so much that we have two. One for home and one attached to the car seat. This ball keeps him entertained for so long. We even gifted one to my 9 month old nephew because he was obsessed with it during a play date. This ball is great for babies working on motor skills. It’s super easy for them to grasp and even smoosh a little bit for ease of handling. We also hang ours from our kick n play piano which he really liked when he was smaller. It’s super great quality.

reviews.name: Victoria
reviews.title: Simple, Lightweight, and Perfect for Little Hands
reviews.body: This Oball is a great first toy for babies. The open, flexible design makes it very easy for little hands to grasp, even at an early age. It’s lightweight, soft, and safe, so there’s no worry about babies bumping themselves while playing.
